sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n71444" key="canqoka/rhnos" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ξανθο-κάρηνος</orth> <pron extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="pron">[κᾰ]</pron>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>, <sense id="n71444.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">with yellow head,</tr_> of Dionysus, <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <title_ TEIform="title">AP</title_> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">9.524.15</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
